blocks.subtext: Retrofit double glazing is our main business — we add a second pane to your existing windows. We also do emergency repairs, shower screens, splashbacks, mirrors, and commercial glazing. 10-year warranty on every job.

blocks.heading: Retrofit Double Glazing
blocks.bodyText: We add a second layer of glass to your existing windows — no frame replacement. Works on timber, aluminium, and steel frames. Installed in one day with minimal disruption.
blocks.imageAlt: Double glazed window close-up — retrofit installation Melbourne
bullets: Works on existing timber, aluminium & steel frames
Up to 70% quieter — ideal for tram & traffic noise
Up to 70% less heat loss in winter
Installed in one day, no permits required
Beat any genuine quote by 30% — guaranteed in writing

blocks.heading: Emergency Glass Repair
blocks.bodyText: Broken window? We respond within 2–4 hours across Melbourne. Temporary board-up available if immediate replacement isn't possible. Insurance documentation provided on request.
blocks.imageAlt: Emergency glass repair — glazier on site in Melbourne
bullets: 2–4 hour response time for inner suburbs
All glass types: single, double, shower screens, shopfronts

blocks.heading: Shower Screens
blocks.bodyText: Semi-frameless and frameless shower screens supplied and installed across Melbourne. We measure on site for a perfect fit.

blocks.heading: Glass Splashbacks
blocks.bodyText: Custom glass splashbacks in any colour for kitchens and bathrooms. Toughened safety glass, cut to size and installed by our team.
bullets: Any colour — matched to your paint or tile
Easy to clean, no grout lines

blocks.heading: Custom Mirrors
blocks.bodyText: Custom-cut mirrors for bathrooms, gyms, hallways, and feature walls. Any size, any shape, cut and fitted by our team.

blocks.heading: Commercial Glazing
blocks.bodyText: Shopfront glazing, office partitions, and large-format commercial glass. We supply and install across Melbourne with competitive trade pricing.
blocks.imageAlt: Commercial glazing — shopfront and office glass Melbourne

blocks.heading: Service Questions
blocks.subheading: Common questions about what we do.

faqs.a: Retrofit double glazing adds a second pane of glass to your existing single-glazed windows, creating an insulated unit without replacing the frame. It's the most cost-effective way to get double glazing in an older home.

faqs.q: How much does retrofit double glazing cost?
faqs.a: Most Melbourne homes land between $2,400 and $6,000 depending on how many windows you upgrade. Use our Instant Estimate to get your exact range in minutes.
Most homes are completed in one day. We work room by room to minimise disruption.

faqs.q: What is the warranty on retrofit double glazing?
faqs.a: We offer a 10-year warranty on all retrofit double glazing installations, covering glass and workmanship with no conditions or fine print.

faqs.q: Can you beat a competitor quote on double glazing?
faqs.a: Yes — we will beat any genuine, like-for-like written competitor quote by at least 30%, guaranteed in writing with the same 10-year warranty.

faqs.q: Do you do 24/7 emergency glass repair in Melbourne?
faqs.a: Yes. We provide emergency glass repair and board-up services across Melbourne, available 24 hours.

faqs.q: How quickly can you respond to a broken window in Melbourne?
faqs.a: We aim to respond within 2–4 hours for emergency calls across inner Melbourne suburbs.

faqs.q: Do you provide temporary board-up for broken windows?
faqs.a: Yes — if glass cannot be replaced immediately, we provide secure temporary board-up to protect your property.

faqs.q: Is emergency glass repair covered by home insurance?
faqs.a: Most home and contents policies cover accidental glass breakage. We can provide documentation to support your claim.

faqs.q: Do you service all Melbourne suburbs?
faqs.a: Yes — we cover all of metropolitan Melbourne, eastern, northern, and inner-western suburbs. Call for outer-metro jobs.
Most jobs are scheduled within 2–3 weeks of deposit. Emergency glass repairs are same-day.
Retrofit double glazing quotes are done online with our Instant Estimate tool — no site visit needed. Shower screens and custom work require a site measure.

blocks.heading:

blocks.subtext: Generate your own quote in minutes, or call us directly for any service.
